funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT)

eligibility.summary: DPIIT-recognized startups incorporated less than 2 years ago, with a business idea for product/service with market fit and commercialization scope. Must not have received more than ₹10 lakh under other central/state govt schemes.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Department of Biotechnology (DBT), Government of India

eligibility.summary: Indian citizens/researchers/entrepreneurs with innovative biotech ideas. Must be incubated or have a registered company with functional R&D lab. Project should have commercialization potential, not basic research.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY), Government of India

eligibility.summary: DPIIT-recognized startups registered as Private Limited or LLP. Must have working prototype/MVP, valid pilot work order/purchase order from eligible corporate/PSU/unicorn. Preference to Tier-II/III city startups. Must not be beneficiary of TIDE 2.0 or SAMRIDH.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: National Science & Technology Entrepreneurship Development Board (NSTEDB), DST
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Department of Science and Technology (DST), Government of India

eligibility.summary: Company registered in India, preferably DPIIT-registered. Must have minimum 3 months association with incubator. Must have developed clarity on USP and value proposition. At least 51% Indian promoter shareholding. Must have MVP stage minimum.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.program_name: Kerala Startup Mission Seed Support Scheme
funding_opportunities.program_owner: Department of Electronics & Information Technology, Government of Kerala

eligibility.summary: Startup registered in Kerala as LLP or Private Limited Company with active KSUM Unique ID. Must be working on innovative product (not service delivery). First-time founders preferred. Not for salaries of founding team or costly assets.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
benefits: investment up to ₹1.25 crore via iSAFE

eligibility.summary: Early-stage Indian startups actively building. Looking to raise first institutional cheque. Tech-focused ventures with scalable business models.
Generative AI startups based in India. Preferably with some traction and team. Open to startups building GenAI products across sectors.

Female-founded or co-founded startups globally. Female founder/co-founder must hold minimum 33% equity. Companies registered less than 7 years (after Jan 1, 2019). Preference to startups actively raising funds.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.program_name: IIT Madras Incubation Cell (IITMIC) Incubation Program

eligibility.summary: Open to IITM faculty/staff/students/alumni and external startups with strong technology base. Technology ventures with innovative products/services, commercial viability. Screening via e-application and incubation committee approval.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Foundation for Innovation and Technology Transfer (FITT), IIT Delhi

eligibility.summary: Technology-driven startups with innovative products/processes, preferably within first 5 years. Registered as private limited company in India. Majority (>50%) Indian citizen shareholding. At least one promoter working full-time.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Startup Incubation and Innovation Centre (SIIC), IIT Kanpur

eligibility.summary: Technology-driven startups with innovative ideas. Open to IITK community and external entrepreneurs. Focus on technology commercialization.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: Society for Innovation and Entrepreneurship (SINE), IIT Bombay

eligibility.summary: Deep tech startups with strong research foundation. Open to IIT Bombay community and external founders. Focus on IP-led ventures with commercialization potential.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.program_name: Naaripreneur for Her Program Cohort 2 – IIMV FIELD
funding_opportunities.organization: IIMV FIELD (IIM Visakhapatnam Foundation for Incubation Entrepreneurial Learning and Development)

eligibility.summary: Women-led startups and ventures building solutions for women. Early-stage ventures with innovative ideas. Preference to women founders.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.program_name: Youth Co:Lab National Innovation Challenge 2026 – India
funding_opportunities.program_owner: UNDP India / Atal Innovation Mission / T-Hub Foundation

eligibility.summary: Youth-led startups and NGOs in India with at least one founder aged 15-29. Both registered and unregistered startups eligible. Focus on responsible consumption and Mission LiFE alignment.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.organization: AIC IIT Delhi (Atal Incubation Centre, IIT Delhi)

eligibility.summary: Students and innovators with ideas at TRL 0-3. Early-stage technology ventures. Open to Haryana-based and other eligible startups.
Indian app innovators and startups building Android apps. Focus on quality apps with growth potential.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.program_name: NEEV Startup Kickstart Program – Pre-Incubation Cohort 2026 (IKN Innovation Foundation)
funding_opportunities.program_owner: International Management Institute Kolkata / RP Sanjiv Goenka Group

eligibility.summary: Early-stage startups and student founders. Ventures at idea to MVP stage. Focus on social enterprise, sustainability, and rural development.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.program_name: PrISE Cohort 3.0 – Incubation Program for Early-Stage Social Enterprises (Bala Vikasa)
funding_opportunities.organization: Bala Vikasa Center for Social and Responsible Business

eligibility.summary: Early-stage social enterprises with scalable solutions addressing social and environmental challenges.

funding_opportunities.label: startup
funding_opportunities.program_name: IIT (BHU) Varanasi I-DAPT HUB Incubation Program Cohort 3

eligibility.summary: Startups working in data analytics, AI, IoT, robotics, and predictive technologies. Open to early-stage and growth-stage technology ventures.
